title: Product Marketer - London
must_haves: AI-native marketer; sees AI as a force multiplier
Demand gen + creative written/visual content + product marketing
Translate product USP into LinkedIn/blog/email content; drive inbound pipeline via events/partnerships
Hands-on execution; strong pulse on market and funnel metrics
Tell company story via case studies, white papers, blog
met_strengths: Strong content/lifecycle/PR marketing depth (blog, email, social, PR agencies, events)
Proven demand/conversion work (5k presale conversions, segmentation, A/B testing)
Explicitly AI-native — builds AI agents; matches Sequence's force-multiplier framing
Founding-era operator comfortable with ownership and direct customer/leadership access
hard_blockers_note: Soft concerns: fintech/revenue-ops domain (not Ryan's crypto/Web3 core) and B2B product-marketing emphasis vs his community-led/consumer growth.
one_line_verdict: Solid content/demand-gen craft match and AI-native fit; domain shift to B2B fintech revenue tooling is the main stretch, not a blocker.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby posting API; full description pulled. a16z/Salesforce/645-backed; London role distinct from NYC variant.
